description: I'm a C# and .NET developer focused on backend systems and API development. I build scalable applications with authentication, data processing, and clean architecture principles. I also have experience integrating Python-based solutions for automation and data-driven features.
detailOrQuote: I believe in understanding systems from the ground up — building from scratch to truly grasp the mechanics. I'm focused on apply solid engineering practices with AI as a force multiplier, always keeping code clean, maintainable, and ready for real-world challenges.
